about.hero.name: Pakorn
about.hero.bio: I am a chartered professional engineer and engineering team lead at a defence technology company in Australia. With over a decade of engineering experience, I design, develop, and deliver high-quality software for businesses both in Thailand and internationally.
about.expertise.title: Areas of expertise
about.expertise.dev.title: Software Development
about.expertise.dev.desc: End-to-end application design and development — from architecture and backend logic to front-end interfaces and deployment.
about.expertise.testing.title: Software Testing & QA
about.expertise.testing.desc: Rigorous quality assurance across unit, integration, and system testing to ensure every release is stable and production-ready.
about.expertise.solutions.title: Business Solutions
about.expertise.solutions.desc: Managed delivery of complete software solutions tailored to the needs of Thai SMEs — on time, on scope, and built to last.
